memoryArtifacts.headline: John II, Burgrave of Nuremberg. Statue by Ernst Herter, 1899, former Siegesallee in Berlin
Leven
memoryArtifacts.description: Als burggraaf kon hij zijn gebieden uitbreiden: zo bemachtigde hij onder meer het kasteel Plassenburg in Kulmbach en het bijbehorende graafschap toen de graven van Orlamünde in 1340 uitgestorven waren …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John II Burgrave von Nuremberg於1310年出生在德國貝也纽伦堡時，他的父親Frederick IV von Nuremberg23歲，母親Margarethe von Kärnten20歲。他和Elizabeth Von Henneberg至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1357年10月7日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫海爾斯布洛倫享年47歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫海爾斯布洛倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John II Burgrave von Nuremberg于1310年出生在德国貝也纽伦堡时，他的父亲Frederick IV von Nuremberg23岁，母亲Margarethe von Kärnten20岁。他和Elizabeth Von Henneberg至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1357年10月7日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫海爾斯布洛倫享年47岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫海爾斯布洛倫。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Nuremberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nierenberg
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the city of Nurembergin northern Bavaria, Yiddish name Nirnberg, German nameNürnberg, or from another place similarly named.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When John II Burgrave von Nuremberg was born in 1310, in Nuremberg, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Frederick IV von Nuremberg, was 23 and his mother, Margarethe von Kärnten, was 20. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Elizabeth Von Henneberg. He died on 7 October 1357, in Heilsbronn, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 47, and was buried in Heilsbronn, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John II Burgrave von Nuremberg est né en 1310, à Nürnberg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Frederick IV von Nuremberg, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margarethe von Kärnten, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Elizabeth Von Henneberg. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1357, à Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als John II Burgrave von Nuremberg 1310 in Nürnberg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Frederick IV von Nuremberg 23 und seine Mutter Margarethe von Kärnten 20. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Von Henneberg mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1357 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John II Burgrave von Nuremberg è nato il nel 1310 nel Nürnberg, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Frederick IV von Nuremberg, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margarethe von Kärnten, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Elizabeth Von Henneberg. Morì il 7 ottobre 1357, nel Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: John II Burgrave von Nurembergが1310年にドイツバイエルンンuルンバーグで生まれた時，父Frederick IV von Nurembergは23歳，母Margarethe von Kärntenは20歳であった。彼はElizabeth Von Hennebergとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1357年10月7日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチヘイルスブロンで47歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチヘイルスブロンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John II Burgrave von Nuremberg(이)가 1310년 독일 베이른 뉘른베르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Frederick IV von Nuremberg(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margarethe von Kärnten(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Von Henneberg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1357년 10월 7일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 헤이스브론에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 헤이스브론에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John II Burgrave von Nuremberg nasceu em 1310, em Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Frederick IV von Nuremberg, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margarethe von Kärnten, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Elizabeth Von Henneberg. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1357, em Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John II Burgrave von Nuremberg родился в 1310 г. в местности Нюрнберг, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Frederick IV von Nuremberg было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margarethe von Kärnten, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Elizabeth Von Henneberg. Он умер 7 октября 1357 г. в местности хилсбронн, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности хилсбронн, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John II Burgrave von Nuremberg nació en 1310, en Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Frederick IV von Nuremberg, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margarethe von Kärnten, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Elizabeth Von Henneberg. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1357, en Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania.
